summary: Frontend re-test (post QC_DISTRICTS fix). Login and dashboard work correctly, but AvocatSheet still crashes with a NEW ReferenceError as soon as it tries to render. The QC_DISTRICTS fix from iteration_2 is in place (verified at lines 17-24 of AvocatSheet.jsx), however the component references 4 undefined functions that crash the React tree before the sheet is visible. Result: BLOCKED - cannot test ANY of the 5 tabs end-to-end (Identification, Adresses, Inhabilité, Méga, Web).

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: saveMega is not defined - crashes whole component as soon as user opens new/existing avocat sheet. Uncaught runtime error overlay covers entire viewport.
ReferenceError: saveInhab is not defined - referenced at line 346 onClick of save-inhab-btn. Will crash when Inhabilité editor opens.
ReferenceError: deleteInhab is not defined - referenced at line 329 in inhab row delete button.
ReferenceError: toggleDistrict is not defined - referenced at line 386 onChange of mega-district-{id} checkboxes.
Missing GET /api/avocats/{id}/inhabilites and /api/avocats/{id}/mega useEffect - inhabs and mega state never load existing data when sheet opens for editing.

integration_issues.issue: Component throws on render before any tab is interactive. All 5 tabs (tab-ident, tab-adr, tab-inhab, tab-mega, tab-web) are unreachable.

action_items: URGENT: Add missing handler functions in /app/frontend/src/components/AvocatSheet.jsx: saveMega, saveInhab, deleteInhab, toggleDistrict. Without these, the 5-tab workflow is fully blocked.
saveMega should PUT/POST to /api/avocats/{id}/mega with current `mega` state, then toast.success('Profil Méga enregistré').
saveInhab should POST/PUT /api/avocats/{id}/inhabilites with editInhab payload, reload inhabs, clear editInhab.
deleteInhab should confirm + DELETE /api/avocats/{id}/inhabilites/{id} and reload list.
toggleDistrict(id) should add/remove id from mega.districts array and clear tous_districts when not all selected.
Add useEffect for avocat?.id to fetch existing inhabs (GET /api/avocats/{id}/inhabilites) and mega profile (GET /api/avocats/{id}/mega) so edit mode prefills data.

After fix, full re-test of: create avocat (auto code A0001), tabs activation post-create, adresse courant, mega districts toggle, inhab period add, web password set, brute-force lockout, Rapports 6 download buttons, Utilisateurs admin CRUD.
critical_code_review_comments: AvocatSheet.jsx (484 lines) is approaching the 700-line threshold and already mixes 5 tabs of business logic - should be split into AvocatSheetIdent.jsx, AvocatSheetAdresses.jsx, AvocatSheetInhab.jsx, AvocatSheetMega.jsx, AvocatSheetWeb.jsx subcomponents.
Component has no error boundary, so a single ReferenceError tears down the entire sheet content.

The fact that lint passes but runtime crashes shows ESLint 'no-undef' rule is either disabled or not catching JSX onClick/onChange handler refs - tighten ESLint config to fail on undefined identifiers.
Missing loading/error UI states for adresses/inhabs/mega fetches.
saveAdresse uses `?courant=...` query param while body uses payload - inconsistent API style; consider including `courant` inside the JSON body.
test_credentials: admin@gestioncardex.qc / Admin2026! (login confirmed working, redirects to /, sidebar shows Tableau de bord, Avocats, Rapports, Utilisateurs)
seed_data_creation: None - 1 existing avocat already seeded in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_2 fixed QC_DISTRICTS ReferenceError. Iteration_3 found 4 NEW ReferenceErrors in same file (saveMega, saveInhab, deleteInhab, toggleDistrict). Once main agent implements these handlers, re-run full 5-tab workflow + brute-force lockout + Rapports + Utilisateurs. Backend was 27/27 in iter_2 - re-verify only after handler additions if new endpoints (e.g., /mega, /inhabilites) are added.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: AvocatSheet.jsx was authored with JSX onClick/onChange handlers referencing functions (saveMega, saveInhab, deleteInhab, toggleDistrict) that were never defined inside the component body. Because they are only resolved at React render time (not at module evaluation), ESLint+Babel did not flag them. Reproduction: 1) login admin, 2) click 'Avocats' or any avocat row / 'Nouvel avocat' button, 3) immediate 'Uncaught runtime errors: saveMega is not defined' overlay. Mitigation: define the missing handlers next to handleSubmit/saveAdresse following the same pattern (api.put → toast.success → reload). Once defined the QC_DISTRICTS-based district toggle UI will also work.
